title: Never Too Late
why_this_song: Never Too Late by Three Days Grace (2006) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Even if I say it'll be alright
Still, I hear you say you want to end your life
Now and again, we try to just stay alive
The world we knew won't come back
The time we've lost can't get back
The life we had won't be ours again

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "late" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "late" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: This world will never be what I expected
Even if I say it'll be alright

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Never Too Late" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Never Too Late" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Never Too Late", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Never Too Late", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Never Too Late" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Never Too Late" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Never Too Late" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Never Too Late"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Never Too Late" was released in 2006. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Never Too Late" foi lançada em 2006. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Three Days Grace one question about "Never Too Late", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Three Days Grace sobre "Never Too Late", o que seria e por quê?
